questions.question: What New England state proclaimed "The Cosmic Muffin" its official astrologer, in 1993?
What Law & Order detective is the all-time Celebrity Jeopardy! money-winner through 1997, with $34,000?
What did De Beers diamonds worth five million pounds go down with in 1912?
What animals, when first brought to America in 1624, were raised mainly for their hides?
What former Twins star has the most All-Star Game at-bats without a home run, with 41?
What was thrown onto Barbara Bain's L.A. porch on a Sunday, killing her 14-year-old pet pooch?
